'''Team Tralus''' was a [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] team that played for<ref name="HNN" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="EGtP&M">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref> of [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] in the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3]], during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], they were defeated in an upset by<ref name="HNN" /> the planet<ref name="EGtP&M" /> of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir's]] [[Team Ralltiir|team]], with a single score in the Cup's opening round. The result was then reported in an article in the [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo District]] edition of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Team Tralus was mentioned in ''Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round'' an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47]]'' on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref>
